videos.description:

videos.description:

videos.title: How to Use & Customize the Actions Ring on the Signature Comfort Plus Mouse with Logi Options+
videos.description:
Looking for a faster, smarter way to access your most-used shortcuts? In this tutorial, Joe shows you how to set up and customize the powerful Actions Ring feature on your Logitech Signature Comfort Plus Mouse using Logi Options+ App.

The Actions Ring is a customizable, on-screen overlay that acts as a digital extension of your mouse, giving you 8 extra buttons. It automatically adjusts to the app you're currently using, providing direct access to tools, Smart Actions and App shortcuts.

videos.title: How to Customize the Buttons on the Logitech Signature Comfort Plus Mouse with Logi Options+
videos.description:
Want a smoother, more efficient workflow? This step-by-step tutorial shows you exactly how to personalize your Signature Comfort Plus Mouse buttons using the Logi Options+ App for maximum productivity.

Learn to easily customize your side, middle, and top buttons to instantly trigger your most-used shortcuts and stay focused on your work.

In this video, you will learn:
- How to assign popular actions like ""Copy,"" ""Paste"" for faster editing, or ""Mute or Unmute"" for instant control in video

videos.title: Introducing Signature Comfort Plus: Logitech's first mouse with palm cushion
videos.description:
Signature Comfort Plus is designed to enhance comfort and everyday ease. The M850 L mouse debuts Logitech’s palm cushion design, paired with a sculpted right-hand shape and rubber side grips for a more relaxed feel over long hours. Real-world tested by professionals, the palm cushion is tuned for the kind of long desk days people actually have. 

You will discover the key features: 
• Palm cushion support design
• Right-hand sculpted shape with rubber side grips
• Silent clicking and scrolling
•
